name: New England Cranberry Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; rub into the roast using all flour mixture.
2. In a Dutch oven, slowly brown the meat on all sides in hot shortening.
3. Remove from heat; add cloves, cinnamon and 1/2 cup water.
4. Cover tightly and simmer about 2 1/2 hours, or until tender, adding water if necessary.
5. Spoon off fat.
6. Mix cranberry sauce, vinegar and 2 tablespoons water; add to meat.
7. Cover and cook 10 to 15 minutes more.
8. Remove cinnamon; spoon off fat (when serving).
9. Pass pan juices with meat.
10. Yields 6 to 8 servings.
